message:
test(fp-conformance): add property-based IO round-trip tests for SQL, Excel, Feather (frankenpandas-44y)

Add 9 new proptest properties verifying IO round-trip correctness:

Feather (Arrow IPC file format):
- Shape preservation through write/read cycle
- Column name preservation
- Int64 value exact preservation

Arrow IPC stream format:
- Shape preservation through write/read cycle

SQL (SQLite via rusqlite):
- Shape preservation through write/read cycle
- Int64 value exact preservation
- Column name preservation (sorted comparison)

Excel (xlsx via calamine/rust_xlsxwriter):
- Shape preservation through write/read cycle
- Int64 value exact preservation (verifies integer recovery from f64)

Total property tests: 75 (66 existing + 9 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
